name: G Squared Ascend II Inc. Class A Ordinary Shares
summary: G Squared Ascend II Inc. is a blank check company (SPAC) formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company is sponsored by affiliates of G Squared, a global venture capital firm. It is headquartered in Chicago, Illinois.
